channel.title: PNallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from PNallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Georgia officials challenge DOJ request for poll worker data
item.description: Election officials in Georgia's Fulton County have sought a court order to prevent the U.S. Department of Justice from accessing personal information.

item.title: Professor Pleads Guilty in Death of Paul Kessler
Trump Participates in Presidential Fitness Test
US: Iran Truce Holds Amid Attacks in Strait of Hormuz, UAE
item.description: A ceasefire remains in effect despite reported attacks by Iran in the Strait of Hormuz and against the United Arab Emirates.
